name: claude-usage-bar
description: Session (5h) and weekly Claude Code token usage, as bars in the VS Code status bar.

commands.title: Claude Usage: Reset caps and high-water marks

claudeUsageBar.includeCacheReads.markdownDescription: Count `cache_read_input_tokens` toward usage. Off by default: cache reads are ~97% of raw token volume and are heavily discounted wherever they are metered, so including them makes the bar track conversation length more than actual work.

claudeUsageBar.sessionWindowHours.description: Length of the rolling session window, in hours.

claudeUsageBar.weekWindowDays.description: Length of the rolling weekly window, in days.

claudeUsageBar.refreshSeconds.description: How often to re-read transcripts and repaint. Reads are incremental (only bytes appended since the last poll).

claudeUsageBar.claudeHome.description: Path to the .claude directory. Empty means ~/.claude.

claudeUsageBar.barCells.description: Width of each bar, in characters. Each cell renders 8 sub-steps of fill.

claudeUsageBar.colors.markdownDescription: Bar colours as hex strings. Applied to the status bar item's foreground. Any key you omit keeps its default.

yellow.description: At or above the yellow threshold.

orange.description: At or above the orange threshold.

red.description: At or above the red threshold.

claudeUsageBar.thresholds.markdownDescription: Fill fractions (0-1) at which each colour takes over. Any key you omit keeps its default.
